tools.name: reddit-get-post
tools.description: Get detailed content of a specific Reddit post with comments.

tools.name: reddit-get-user-comments
tools.description: Get comments submitted by a specific Reddit user.

tools.name: reddit-get-user-info
tools.description: Get information about a Reddit user.

tools.name: reddit-get-user-posts
tools.description: Get posts submitted by a specific Reddit user.

tools.name: reddit-search
tools.description: Search Reddit for posts matching a query.

tools.name: twitter-read
tools.description: Read a single tweet by URL or ID.

tools.name: twitter-search
tools.description: Search X/Twitter for tweets matching a query. Returns token-optimized results with engagement metrics.

tools.name: twitter-user-tweets
tools.description: Get recent tweets from a specific X/Twitter user.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: reddit-get-post, reddit-get-posts, reddit-get-user-comments, reddit-get-user-posts, reddit-search, twitter-read, twitter-thread · Private data: twitter-search · Public sink: reddit-get-post, twitter-read, twitter-thread.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: reddit-get-post, reddit-get-posts, reddit-get-user-comments, reddit-get-user-posts, reddit-search, twitter-read, twitter-thread · Private data: twitter-search · Public sink: reddit-get-post, twitter-read, twitter-thread

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
